mapper.sql: SELECT users.employee_number, users.login_id, users.password, users.name, users.user_cd, users.department_cd, users.branch_cd, users.registered, users.del_flg, user_type_mst.type AS userType_type, user_type_mst.category AS userType_category, user_type_mst.code AS userType_code, user_type_mst.name AS userType_name, department_mst.type AS department_type, department_mst.category AS department_category, department_mst.code AS department_code, department_mst.name AS department_name, branch_mst.type AS branch_type, branch_mst.category AS branch_category, branch_mst.code AS branch_code, branch_mst.name AS branch_name FROM users LEFT JOIN mst_code user_type_mst ON users.user_cd = user_type_mst.code AND user_type_mst.type = 'user_type' LEFT JOIN mst_code department_mst ON users.department_cd = department_mst.code AND department_mst.type = 'department' LEFT JOIN mst_code branch_mst ON users.branch_cd = branch_mst.code AND branch_mst.type = 'branch'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (employee_number,name, login_id, password, user_cd, department_cd, branch_cd, registered) VALUES (#{employeeNumber},#{name}, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{userType.code}, #{department.code}, #{branch.code}, now())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET name = #{name}, login_id = #{loginId}, password = #{password}, user_cd = #{userType.code}, department_cd = #{department.code}, branch_cd = #{branch.code} WHERE employee_number = #{employeeNumber}
